stepText: If you have at least 825,000 sailing XP, boost to build an adamant helm on both your sloop and your skiff, then complete charting the Shrouded Ocean (if you do not, choose a training method between Jubbly Jive, courier tasks, bounty tasks or salvaging and get enough xp) by charting to Deepfin Point and following the following route Shrouded Ocean, part 2.png. Train your woodcutting to level 80 (e.g. at teaks or sulliusceps), then travel (back) to Sunbleak Island, collect the dragon helm schematic and build the bank chest there if you want to (if you intend to afk woodcut, ironwood trees are a very good option - take lunar Plank Make to produce 4 planks on the island) and chop enough logs for 20 ironwood planks, taking into account plank vouchers if you have them.

abstractItems.label: woodcutting training methods
abstractItems.rawToken: teaks or sulliusceps or ironwood trees
